build_system: Maven 3.9+ with maven-surefire-plugin (clears NODE_OPTIONS for Jsii compatibility)
test_framework: JUnit 5 with CDK assertions (Template.fromStack pattern in src/test/java/com/myorg/)
verification_instructions: Run 'mvn compile' to verify project still compiles; run 'mvn test' to verify existing tests still pass. This is a docs-only task so no new tests are expected.
setup_instructions: Java 17 and Maven 3.9+ available in sandbox via mise. Run 'mvn compile' to verify baseline.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can reach Maven Central. NODE_OPTIONS issue handled by surefire plugin config. No Docker daemon needed for this task (docs only).
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits required (docs: prefix for documentation changes). ARCHITECTURE.md Mermaid diagram must stay in sync with code. TDD workflow required for code changes (not applicable here - docs only).
key_patterns: Project uses flowchart TD Mermaid diagrams for architecture. AGENT_GUIDELINES.md references architecture sync rules. README.md links to ARCHITECTURE.md. CONTRIBUTING.md references AGENT_GUIDELINES.md.
directory_structure: Root: ARCHITECTURE.md, README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, pom.xml, cdk.json. Source: src/main/java/com/myorg/ (CdkBaseApp.java, CdkBaseStack.java). Tests: src/test/java/com/myorg/ (CdkBaseTest.java). CI: .github/workflows/ci.yml. Agent guidelines: .github/AGENT_GUIDELINES.md.
